name: Woodland Carved Wood Accent Table - Black - Threshold™
description:
Create an inviting space to kick up your feet with the Woodland Carved Wood Accent Table Black from Threshold™. With its combination of solid color, clean lines and homey appeal, this wooden end table fits with a variety of decor schemes, making it a breeze to style. Set it up next to an armchair in your reading nook or on either side of a loveseat to create the perfect spot for a beverage and a book so you can relax in style.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
